1.description: Core architecture for the Unity-based PvE online multiplayer game hosted on Vercel.

2.description: Establish real-time connectivity using serverless Redis functions to simulate a multiplayer environment.

3.description: Deployment and frontend integration of the game components.

4.description: Integrate Unity WebGL using react-unity-webgl and manage the component lifecycle.

5.description: Implement serverless functions to update game state and provide the 'multiplayer feel'.

6.description: Develop the Header, Main, and Footer sections for the landing page using React and Vite.

7.description: Configure the Vercel hosting environment for the frontend and game assets.
